title: Grade Letter from Score
prompt_md:
## Goal
Read one integer score and print the corresponding letter grade on one line.

## Input
- Line 1: one integer score (0 ≤ score ≤ 100)

## Output
- Print exactly one line: the letter grade.
- Grading: score >= 90 → `A`, score >= 80 → `B`, score >= 70 → `C`, score >= 60 → `D`, otherwise → `F`.

## Requirements
1. Use an `if` / `else if` / `else` block with braces around every branch body.
2. Exactly one letter is printed for any valid input.
3. Edge cases: score = 90 (boundary for A), score = 59 (F), score = 0.

title: Absolute Value (complete the function)
prompt_md:
## Goal
Complete the function `int absoluteValue(int n)` so it returns the absolute value of `n` without using any standard library functions.

## Input
- Line 1: one integer N (-1000 ≤ N ≤ 1000)

## Output
- Print exactly one line: the absolute value of N.

## Requirements
1. Implement `absoluteValue` using an `if`/`else` block.
2. Do not use `std::abs` or any other library function.
3. Edge cases: N = 0 (returns 0), N = -1000 (returns 1000), N = 1000 (returns 1000).
